Container.Name: TractorBeeam365-MCP
Container.Overview: Independent Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for Veeam Backup for Microsoft 365 (VB365). It talks directly to the VB365 REST API so an MCP client (Claude Code, Claude Desktop) can review your backup configuration, find protection gaps, spot trends, and verify cloud immutability. Read-only by default; an opt-in, confirm-token-gated, audited action/restore tier can be enabled with the TB_* variables. Not affiliated with, endorsed by, or supported by Veeam Software. After starting, attach a client to http://[IP]:[PORT:8766]/mcp with the Authorization: Bearer header set to your MCP_AUTH_TOKEN.
Container.Description: Independent MCP server for Veeam Backup for Microsoft 365 (VB365): read-only review by default, plus an opt-in, confirm-gated, audited action/restore tier. HTTP transport fails closed without MCP_AUTH_TOKEN.

Config.Name: MCP HTTP Port
Config.Description: Host port for the MCP streamable-http endpoint (served at /mcp).

Config.Name: VB365_HOST
Config.Description: IP or hostname of the VB365 (Veeam Backup Server) host.

Config.Name: VB365_USERNAME
Config.Description: VB365 account used to obtain a REST API token (DOMAIN\user, .\localuser, or user@domain).

Config.Name: MCP_AUTH_TOKEN
Config.Description: A long random secret. The HTTP transport refuses to start without it. Clients must send the header Authorization: Bearer <this value>.

Config.Name: MCP_TRANSPORT
Config.Description: Leave as streamable-http for the persistent HTTP service.

Config.Name: MCP_HOST
Config.Description: Bind address inside the container. Keep 0.0.0.0 so the published port is reachable; the Unraid port publish is the real network boundary.

Config.Name: MCP_PORT
Config.Description: Container-internal port the server listens on. Match the container side of the port mapping.

Config.Name: VB365_PORT
Config.Description: VB365 RESTful API port (console default is 4443).

Config.Name: VB365_API_VERSION
Config.Description: VB365 REST API version (v8 for VB365 8.x, v7 for 7.x).

Config.Name: VB365_VERIFY_SSL
Config.Description: Verify the VB365 TLS certificate. false accepts the default self-signed cert. Prefer setting VB365_CA_BUNDLE to the server certificate instead.

Config.Name: TB_ENABLE_ACTIONS
Config.Description: Master switch for the write/restore tools. Leave false for read-only. If enabled, also set the per-category TB_ALLOW_* flags and TB_ALLOW_WRITE_OVER_HTTP=true to expose them over HTTP. See the project SECURITY docs before enabling.
